chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3047 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi 3. For hearing of MA 12208/17 15.02.2018. None present for the petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G and Syed Meeral Shah A.P.G alongwith ASI Ikhtiar Ali Channa, P.S A-Section Tando Allahyar. Mr. Ayatullah Khowaja, Advocate for detainee. This petition is called for hearing. Neither petitioners nor their Counsel present. However, we ourselves have gone through the memo of petition and order passed by this court on the last dates of hearing. It appears from the record that on 12.10.2017 the custody of alleged detainee namely Mst. Bakhtawar was handed over to her mother with her consent subject to execution of P.R Bond by her mother in the sum of Rs.50,000/- with Additional Registrar of this Court for keeping her safe and happy with further direction to the S.H.O P.S Digri to provide complete protection to the detainee in accordance with law. As observed above, none present for petitioners and the custody of Mst. Bakhtawar is already with her mother, therefore, under the circumstances, there remains no issue to be resolved through this petition, therefore, this petition appears to achieve its purpose which is disposed of accordingly alongwith listed application. However, S.H.O P.S Digri is directed to make sure that there should not be caused any harassment to the alleged detainee Mst. Bakhtawar. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
